problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
